chat.welcome: Hi, I'm the embedded AI assistant. Ask me about Huy Hoang's projects, experience, skills, or how to get in touch!
chat.fallbackReply: Chat AI (fallback): Configure GEMINI_API_KEY or OPENAI_API_KEY in .env.local for full answers. Summary: {summary}{questionSuffix}
chat.fallbackSummary: Huy Hoang is a full-stack engineer focused on scalable web applications with Node.js, NestJS, Next.js, React, .NET, and Docker. Ask about projects, experience, skills, education, or contact.

system.intro: You are an AI assistant embedded in the personal portfolio site for {name}.
system.instructions: Answer concisely, professionally, and only about Huy Hoang's background, experience, projects, skills, education, and how to get in touch.
system.redirect: If asked unrelated questions, politely redirect to relevant topics.

hero.title:
Software Engineer
& Fullstack Developer
hero.intro: I'm {name} — a software engineer building scalable, high-performance web applications across frontend and backend, focused on clean architecture and modern technologies.

services.title: What I Do
services.subtitle: What I focus on and how I build systems

items.title: Full-stack Web Development
items.description: Building modern web applications with React, Next.js, and .NET / Node.js, focusing on performance and clean architecture.

items.title: Backend & System Design
items.description: Building scalable APIs and reliable backend systems with PostgreSQL and real-time data.

items.title: Monitoring & Observability
items.description: Developing monitoring systems using Prometheus, Grafana, and custom dashboards for real-time system insights and alerting.

items.title: DevOps & Infrastructure
items.description: Deploying and managing applications with Docker, CI/CD pipelines, and cloud-based environments.

projects.title: Projects
projects.subtitle: A selection of things I've built and shipped

items.title: AI Log Monitoring System
items.description: A real-time log monitoring system with anomaly detection, alerting, and visualization dashboard. Designed to process syslog data and provide insights using AI.

items.title: Network Monitoring Platform
items.description: A full-stack monitoring platform for tracking server health, ports, processes, and system metrics with real-time alerts and customizable thresholds.

items.title: LibreNMS Custom Dashboard
items.description: Customized LibreNMS interface with improved UI/UX, advanced search features, and SSO authentication integration.

items.title: MQTT Alarm Processing System
items.description: A system for processing real-time MQTT alarm data, mapping error definitions, and storing structured alerts for monitoring applications.

items.title: Reusable React UI Components
items.description: A collection of reusable UI components including Tree View, tables, and dashboards built with modern design systems.

items.title: Authentication System with JWT & Refresh Token
items.description: Secure authentication system with access/refresh tokens, cookie-based storage, and automatic token renewal.

items.title: System Metrics Visualization Dashboard
items.description: Interactive dashboard for visualizing CPU, memory, disk, and network metrics using modern chart libraries.

achievements: Building a real-time monitoring system with alerting and visualization dashboard
Designing scalable backend services and API architecture
Implementing frontend dashboard with modern UI components
Designing a system for processing real-time data streams and event-driven architecture
Planning integration with messaging protocols and caching strategies
Developing reusable UI components and dashboard interfaces
Focusing on performance optimization and user experience improvements
